narrative:
Reading 1-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,322 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
